title: Creative- Enhanced
description: Modpack designed for the MnSnD Creative- SMP.
body:
![MNSND PRESENTS: CREATIVE-](https://dl.vixen.link/rmm1tz/creative_minus.png)
# Creative- Enhanced
Modpack designed for the MnSnD Creative- SMP. This pack provides a vanilla experience enhanced with a few client-side mods aimed at optimization, QoL, and player customization/expression.

This pack contains the following mods and shaders, please check them out and support the developers!
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)
- [Damage Numbers](https://modrinth.com/mod/damagenumbers)
- [Sakura Blossoms](https://modrinth.com/mod/sakura-blossoms)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Ears](https://modrinth.com/mod/ears)
- [Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-player-models)
- [Wildfire's Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
